title: astragalus nanus
intro: Astragalus nanus, also known as dwarf milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an adaptogen to help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and lowering blood pressure. Astragalus nanus can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
